posts.raw_content:
It is totally believable that Israel tried to kill Trump or that they killed Charlie. Why do I say that?

The Israeli right wing has never hesitated to assassinate anyone who got in their way.  The most famous example is Yitzhak Rabin. When he was a general he literally won the Six Day war for Israel. When he was the sitting Prime Minister, the right wing shot him for trying to make peace with the Palestinians in 1995.

Zionist assassination dates back to 1924 when they killed Jewish journalists like Jacob Israël de Haan, 1944 when they killed Lord Moyne the highest ranking British official in the Middle East, 1948 when they killed Swedish diplomat Count  Folke Bernadotte. 

But it wasn't just targeted assassinations. They bombed the King David Hotel in 1946. They bombed the British Embassy in Rome in 1946, they attempted to bomb the Colonial Office in London in 1947. They ran a letter bomb campaign against the British government ministers in 1947.

Then there's Operation Susanna in 1954 in which Israeli military intelligence recruited Egyptian Jews to plant bombs in Egyptian, American, and British-owned civilian targets (such as cinemas and libraries) in Cairo and Alexandria to frame the Muslim Brotherhood and sour Egypt's relations with the West.

posts.content:
It is totally believable that Israel tried to kill Trump or that they killed Charlie. Why do I say that?

The Israeli right wing has never hesitated to assassinate anyone who got in their way. The most famous example is Yitzhak Rabin. When he was a general he literally won the Six Day war for Israel. When he was the sitting Prime Minister, the right wing shot him for trying to make peace with the Palestinians in 1995.

Zionist assassination dates back to 1924 when they killed Jewish journalists like Jacob Israël de Haan, 1944 when they killed Lord Moyne the highest ranking British official in the Middle East, 1948 when they killed Swedish diplomat Count Folke Bernadotte.

But it wasn't just targeted assassinations. They bombed the King David Hotel in 1946. They bombed the British Embassy in Rome in 1946, they attempted to bomb the Colonial Office in London in 1947. They ran a letter bomb campaign against the British government ministers in 1947.

Then there's Operation Susanna in 1954 in which Israeli military intelligence recruited Egyptian Jews to plant bombs in Egyptian, American, and British-owned civilian targets (such as cinemas and libraries) in Cairo and Alexandria to frame the Muslim Brotherhood and sour Egypt's relations with the West.
